name: Md Shakhrul Iman Siam
title: PhD Student Computer Science
bio: I am Final-year Ph.D. Student, Department of Computer Science and Engineering at The Ohio State University (OSU). I am currently working as a Graduate Research Associate at OSU AIoT and Machine Learning Systems Lab under the supervision of Prof. Mi Zhang. I completed my undergraduate studies in Electrical and Electronic Engineering (EEE) from Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET). Before starting my PhD, I worked for 2.5 years in Industry as a Machine Learning Engineer. I built various computer vision solutions that have very high business Impact. Currently, I am working on the design and implementation of the Efficient Large Language Model.
